## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] UI polish
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build or release
- [ ] Refactor

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm dist` when packaging or Electron behavior changed
- [ ] Manual smoke test

## Privacy And Security

- [ ] This change does not expose clipboard data through logs, errors, network calls, or release artifacts.
- [ ] New persisted fields have defaults and migration-safe normalization.
- [ ] Image/file history remains opt-in if affected.

## Screenshots

Attach screenshots or recordings for UI changes.

## Notes For Reviewers

Mention risky areas, follow-up work, or known limitations.
